message:
feat(tui): refine dashboard, messages screen, widgets, and metrics display

Polish the TUI across multiple screens and the shared widget layer:

Dashboard (tui_screens/dashboard.rs):
- Adjust layout proportions for improved information density

Messages screen (tui_screens/messages.rs, +42/-lines):
- Expand message list rendering with additional metadata columns
- Improve thread-grouped display and navigation

Tool metrics screen (tui_screens/tool_metrics.rs):
- Refine metric label formatting

Widgets (tui_widgets.rs, +63/-lines):
- Add new reusable widget primitives for status indicators
- Improve table rendering with dynamic column sizing

Server core (lib.rs):
- Wire new TUI components into the server initialization path

Bridge and poller (tui_bridge.rs, tui_poller.rs):
- Adjust polling intervals and bridge event routing
- Refine data flow between server state and TUI rendering

Tool metrics (tool_metrics.rs):
- Update metric collection labels

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
